arts.ttl: Chelsea 4-2 Brighton PLAYER RATINGS: Cole Palmer was the standout performer but which Blues star could only muster a 4/10 and who else struggled for Enzo Maresca's side?
arts.sum: KEIRAN GILL AT STAMFORD BRIDGE: Chelsea had to come from behind to beat Brighton 4-2 thanks to Cole Palmer's heroics after Georginio Rutter had given the Seagulls the lead.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans all in agreement after Enzo Fernandez’s performance against Brighton
arts.sum: They're all saying the same thing

arts.ttl: 'His elegance': Theo Walcott now makes Dennis Bergkamp and Cole Palmer claim after latest Chelsea masterclass
arts.sum: You have to be some player to be compared to some of the best to ever set foot in the Premier League but that’s what...

arts.ttl: Brighton player ratings vs Chelsea: One 4 and too many 5s as Cole Palmer runs riot against chaotic Seagulls
arts.sum: A defensive capitulation saw Brighton concede four first-half goals against Chelsea and lose a game for the first time this season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 4-2 Brighton: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Palmer makes history
arts.sum: Cole Palmer scores four as Chelsea continue their impressive form with a 4-2 victory over Brighton & Hove Albion in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer scores four as Chelsea win thriller against Brighton
arts.sum: Palmer became the first player to score four goals in the first half of a Premier League match.

arts.ttl: ‘Unbelievable’: Alan Shearer left wowed by Chelsea player with ‘incredible ability’ after Brighton win
arts.sum: Chelsea’s Cole Palmer stole the headlines after his stunning performance in Saturday’s chaotic win against Brighton. Chelsea continued their strong start to the season this...

arts.ttl: 'Absolutely criminal' - Former Arsenal defender says Fabian Hurzeler is 'wet behind the ears' after Brighton implosion at Chelsea
arts.sum: A former Premier League defender has given a scathing review of Brighton’s defensive performance, after Cole Palmer scored four first-half goals at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Former Fulham and Chelsea star Barry Lloyd dies aged 75 as tributes pour in from his former clubs
arts.sum: He would remain a stalwart for Fulham in the years that followed, playing a total of eight seasons and making 286 appearances in all competitions.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer closes in on Mo Salah record with Brighton quadruple
arts.sum: Chelsea attacker Cole Palmer is closing in on a Premier League record after bagging four goals in the first half of the Blues’ clash against Brighton. Palmer has yet to fail with a penalty in his career and he is rapidly closing in on the Premier League record of Mohamed Salah .
